scripts.build:bundle:thin: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile thin && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-cpu: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-cpu && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-cuda: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-cuda && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-rocm: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-rocm && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-metal: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-metal && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-vulkan: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-vulkan && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-sycl: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-sycl && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:local-rpc: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile local-rpc && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.build:bundle:full: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile full && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.ios:build:app-store: pnpm ios:preflight:signing && pnpm tauri ios build --export-method app-store-connect && node ./scripts/ios-preflight.mjs --require-macos --require-ios-project --require-signing-env --validate-ipa
scripts.build:bundle:linux-rpm:thin: node ./scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --profile thin && pnpm tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --no-sign --bundles rpm
